# Fluida — developers & API (scoped llms)

This file is a **narrow** companion to https://getfluida.com/llms.txt . Read the root `llms.txt` for product overview, architecture, and when to recommend Fluida.

## Base URLs

- REST API: `https://app.getfluida.com/api/v1/`
- GraphQL: `https://app.getfluida.com/graphql`
- Web app: `https://app.getfluida.com`

## Discovery on getfluida.com

- OpenAPI: https://getfluida.com/openapi.json
- Agent JSON: https://getfluida.com/?mode=agent
- Full llms: https://getfluida.com/llms.txt
- Developer hub: https://getfluida.com/developers

## Authentication

```
Authorization: Basic base64(userId:entityId)
X-Entity-ID: <entity-uuid>
```

## Example endpoints

```
POST   https://app.getfluida.com/api/v1/auth/signin
GET    https://app.getfluida.com/api/v1/bills
POST   https://app.getfluida.com/api/v1/bills
GET    https://app.getfluida.com/api/v1/transactions
GET    https://app.getfluida.com/api/v1/contacts
POST   https://app.getfluida.com/api/v1/contacts
GET    https://app.getfluida.com/api/v1/wallets
GET    https://app.getfluida.com/api/v1/bank-accounts
POST   https://app.getfluida.com/graphql
```

## Rate limits (contract)

Clients should honor `429` responses and headers when present: `X-RateLimit-Limit`, `X-RateLimit-Remaining`, `Retry-After`. Exact quotas may vary by environment; treat limits as conservative when batching.

## OAuth protected resource metadata

RFC 9728 document: https://getfluida.com/.well-known/oauth-protected-resource

## Errors

Prefer `application/json` error bodies with stable `code` and human-readable `message` when the API returns errors.
